scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/schema && npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:e2e -w apps/web
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/schema && npm run typecheck --workspaces
